verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate, pueri, Dominum ;  laudate nomen Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ הַ֭לְלוּ עַבְדֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה הַֽ֝לְל֗וּ אֶת־שֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise the Lord, ye children: praise ye the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Halleluja! Kiittäkäät te, Herran palveliat, kiittäkäät Herran nimeä!
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord. Praise, O ye servants of the Lord, praise the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sit nomen Domini benedictum  ex hoc nunc et usque in sæculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִ֤י שֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָ֣ה מְבֹרָ֑ךְ מֵ֝עַתָּ֗ה וְעַד־עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Blessed be the name of the Lord, from henceforth now and for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiitetty olkoon Herran nimi, nyt ja ijankaikkisesti!
verses.king_james: Blessed be the name of the Lord from this time forth and for evermore.

verses.latin_vulgate: A solis ortu usque ad occasum  laudabile nomen Domini.
verses.douay_rheims: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same, the name of the Lord is worthy of praise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Auringon koitosta hänen laskemiseensa asti olkoon Herran nimi kiitetty!
verses.king_james: From the rising of the sun unto the going down of the same the Lord’s name is to be praised.

verses.latin_vulgate: Excelsus super omnes gentes Dominus,  et super cælos gloria ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָ֖ם עַל־כׇּל־גּוֹיִ֥ם ׀ יְהֹוָ֑ה עַ֖ל הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם כְּבוֹדֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is high above all nations; and his glory above the heavens.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra on korkia ylitse kaikkein pakanain, ja hänen kunniansa ylitse taivasten.
verses.king_james: The Lord is high above all nations, and his glory above the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis sicut Dominus Deus noster, qui in altis habitat,
verses.douay_rheims: Who is as the Lord our God, who dwelleth on high:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuka on niinkuin Herra meidän Jumalamme, joka niin korkialla asuu?
verses.king_james: Who is like unto the Lord our God, who dwelleth on high,

verses.latin_vulgate: et humilia respicit in cælo et in terra ?
verses.douay_rheims: and looketh down on the low things in heaven and in earth?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuitenkin katsoo alimmaisia taivaassa ja maassa;
verses.king_james: Who humbleth himself to behold the things that are in heaven, and in the earth!

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscitans a terra inopem,  et de stercore erigens pauperem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְקִ֥ימִ֣י מֵעָפָ֣ר דָּ֑ל מֵ֝אַשְׁפֹּ֗ת יָרִ֥ים אֶבְיֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Raising up the needy from the earth, and lifting up the poor out of the dunghill:
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka köyhän tomusta ylentää, ja vaivaisen loasta korottaa,
verses.king_james: He raiseth up the poor out of the dust, and lifteth the needy out of the dunghill;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut collocet eum cum principibus,  cum principibus populi sui.
verses.douay_rheims: That he may place him with princes, with the princes of his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Istuttaaksensa häntä päämiesten sivuun, kansansa päämiesten sivuun;
verses.king_james: That he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui habitare facit sterilem in domo,  matrem filiorum lætantem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֽוֹשִׁיבִ֨י ׀ עֲקֶ֬רֶת הַבַּ֗יִת אֵֽם־הַבָּנִ֥ים שְׂמֵחָ֗ה הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Who maketh a barren woman to dwell in a house, the joyful mother of children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka hedelmättömät saattaa huoneesen asumaan, että hän riemuiseksi lasten äidiksi tulee. Halleluja!
verses.king_james: He maketh the barren woman to keep house, and to be a joyful mother of children. Praise ye the Lord.
